title: Lesson 26: Introduction to CSS (Making Your Website Beautiful)

content.explanation:
🎨 Your Website Works — Now Let’s Style It

Up until now, your websites have been built using HTML only.

That means they work — but they don’t look very attractive yet.

🌐 What is CSS?

CSS (Cascading Style Sheets) is used to style HTML elements.

It controls colors, spacing, fonts, and layout.

⚡ Simple Analogy

  • HTML = structure (bones)
  • CSS = design (clothes, colors, appearance)

syntax_breakdown.content:
🧪 First CSS Example

<style>
  h1 {
    color: blue;
    font-size: 40px;
  }

  p {
    color: gray;
  }
</style>

📌 How It Works

  • selector → selects HTML element (h1, p, etc.)
  • property → what you want to change (color, size)
  • value → new setting (blue, 40px)

🧠 Key Rule

👉 CSS changes appearance, not structure

editor_sandbox.starter_code:
My Styled Website

This is my first time adding styles.

quiz_engine.question: What is the main purpose of CSS?
options: To structure content on a webpage
To style and design HTML elements
quiz_engine.explanation_feedback: Correct 🎉 CSS is used to style HTML elements like colors, spacing, fonts, and layout.

takeaways: CSS is used to style HTML elements
HTML handles structure, CSS handles design
CSS uses selectors like h1 and p
You can change colors, sizes, and layout
